name: Polymarket
fullText: JUST IN: OpenAI CFO Sarah Friar has reportedly voiced concerns over Sam Altman’s spending, says the company is not ready to IPO.

fullText: BREAKING: Rapper 6ix9ine reveals while he was in prison, he slept in Diddy's old bed which was right next to Venezuelan ex-dictator Maduro's bunk.
